name: web-login
description: Demo dynamic web challenge. Start an env, browse /e/<env_id>/, and authenticate as admin.

hints.title: default credential
hints.content: The demo admin password is localpass.

hints.title: debug backup
hints.content: After login, check the debug backup endpoint with debug=1.

name: pwn-echo
description: Demo dynamic pwn challenge exposed through the fixed TCP gateway. Send the routing header first, then interact with the service.

hints.title: gateway
hints.content: Connect to the TCP gateway and send the routing_header returned by the start-env API.
